# Handling LOS Application Rejections

: Priyamvada S
Created time: May 18, 2026 10:29 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: May 25, 2026 12:22 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Currently in LOS , several business-critical validation checks are performed — such as client deduplication, MNRL checks, and AML/PEP screenings. 

However when any of these checks fail, the system surfaces a generic ‘declined’  error message (”Something went wrong”) to the user. The root cause is that the backend does not propagate the specific error code or reason to the frontend, so the frontend cannot render contextual, actionable error screens.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

% Reduction in  LOS CS tickets on loan stuck due to "unknown error" 

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements

Following errors currently are not handled  & require proper UI handling. 

Step 1: Volt BE to pass the relevant error codes to FE (see attached table)

Step 2: Volt FE to display the relevant error messages mapped to the error code  (see attached table)

| **#** | **Error Type** | **Triggered At Stage(s)** | Backend error code (to be configured) | Applicable figma screen |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **1** | **Client Dedupe Failed** | Create Opportunity / Submit Opportunity | CLIENT_DEDUPE_FAILED | [Screen B](https://www.figma.com/design/cE4geUqJoahVIl3AB2ChwI/Exploration-Ad-Hoc-tasks?node-id=1585-1069&t=he1f85BcYrRTPziU-0) |
| **2** | **MNRL Rejection** | Create Opportunity / Submit Opportunity | MNRL_REJECTION | [Screen A](https://www.figma.com/design/cE4geUqJoahVIl3AB2ChwI/Exploration-Ad-Hoc-tasks?node-id=1584-1013&t=qbMANkHQjz4MhzYM-0) |
| **3** | **AML / PEP Check Failed** | Post-Mandate / Submit Opportunity | AML_PEP_CHECK_FAILED | [Screen A](https://www.figma.com/design/cE4geUqJoahVIl3AB2ChwI/Exploration-Ad-Hoc-tasks?node-id=1584-1013&t=qbMANkHQjz4MhzYM-0) |
